---
title: "Housing and Net Zero — Aalto University"
description: "Invited talk at Aalto University, Finland, on the recently completed Housing and Net Zero research project."
author: "Adam Dennett"
date: "2024-09-29"
categories: [talk, housing, EPC, net zero]
image: featured.png
---

Invited talk delivered at **Aalto University, Finland** in September 2024,
covering the methods and findings of the Housing and Net Zero research
project — what EPC data can (and can't) tell us about the residential
pathway to net zero.

- [Open the presentation →](https://adamdennett.github.io/aalto_presentation_2024/)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/adamdennett/aalto_presentation_2024)
